Video.summary: Adrian Miles is a veteran in the Ring but will it be enough against Miles Anstead at HK51. This fight ends with a Tap Out and a lip injury from Adrian Miles. Brian Crowe is fighting his first fight against Will Woo. He takes some good hits to the forehead, and hurts his foot and thumb. Dr. Murray Heber helps both fighters with their post fight medicals.
Video.grandparentTitle: After The Fight - HK51 Adrian Miles/Brian Crowe
Video.title: After The Fight - HK51 Adrian Miles/Brian Crowe

Image.alt: After The Fight - HK51 Adrian Miles/Brian Crowe
After The Fight - HK51 Adrian Miles/Brian Crowe

Video.summary: Justin Lajeunesse is no stranger to the sport of Wrestling, but are there some injury prevention techniques he hasn't considered? Pilates trainer Marie Michalski offers her advice to ensure that his posture is not forgotten in his training regiment.

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. This is followed by the very entertaining pro contest between the ever explosive Vyron Phillips taking on BJJ Black Belt Leo Xavier.
